intro: Tomas Reyes. You want to cross the Mississippi.
I control the only crossing that won't get you killed.
The bridge enforcers report to the Governor. The ferry costs fuel we don't have.
But I have a third option.
I clear your name from the Governor's log. Completely.
In return: you carry a package to Vault 49. Don't open it. Don't ask what it is.
accept_response: Package is under the bar. Third bottle from the left.
Vault 49 is three days south through the bayou.

accepted_followup: The package doesn't get lighter the longer you look at it.
